creator: cherry@trombik.org
text:
- Update to 0.24.2

Added file(s):
- files/patch-category-name
- fix rc.subr scripts
- support 'service { "category/name": }'
- use TMPPLIST
- remove patches already in upstream

sorry for not updating sooner.

Removed file(s):
- files/patch-define_batch
- files/patch-old_rcd_support
- files/patch-package-name-with-dash
